goal: Create a dedicated portfolio directory and English showcase entry for KMD review, and define a strict vertical-slice demo scope for external presentation.
constraints: Keep all runtime gameplay code untouched; this task is documentation and portfolio packaging only.
Do not change existing canon or scope constraints, and do not modify files outside allowed_write_paths.
GitHub root README remains a developer entry; add a separate English showcase entrance for KMD/portfolio review.
Demo definition must be narrowed to a single vertical slice: 2 schools, 1 topic, 1 battleground, 12-20 cards, 3 full rounds.
If required information is unknown (for example external video URL), write UNKNOWN and register it in open_questions.md.
deliverables: New portfolio directory skeleton with README_EN.md, demo_script_en.md, research_proposal_en.md, video_link.md, screenshots/, and Jixia_Portfolio.pdf placeholder.
English portfolio page focused on project value rather than implementation detail overload.
Root README section titled 'For KMD / Portfolio Review: Start Here' linking to the English portfolio entry.
Open question record(s) for any UNKNOWN items required by the new portfolio package.
